description: Create Firebase Cloud Functions that trigger push notifications via FCM when Firestore documents are created in notification collections (hrd_notifikasi, hrd_broadcast, hrd_meeting_invites, hrd_pengumuman, hrd_meeting, hrd_chat). This is the server-side component needed to actually SEND push notifications to devices.
steps: Step 1 - Create functions/ directory at the project root with proper structure: functions/package.json, functions/index.js, functions/.eslintrc.js
Step 2 - Create functions/package.json with: name 'ims-functions', firebase-admin and firebase-functions dependencies, node 18 engine, eslint devDep. Scripts should include lint and serve.

Step 3 - Create functions/index.js with Cloud Functions that: (a) Import firebase-functions and firebase-admin, initialize admin app, (b) Create an onCreate trigger for 'hrd_notifikasi/{docId}' that reads the targetUser field, looks up their FCM token(s) from 'hrd_fcm_tokens' collection, and sends a push notification with the title and message from the document, (c) Create an onCreate trigger for 'hrd_broadcast/{docId}' that sends to ALL registered FCM tokens, (d) Create an onCreate trigger for 'hrd_meeting_invites/{docId}' that sends to the target user's FCM token, (e) Create an onCreate trigger for 'hrd_pengumuman/{docId}' that sends to ALL registered tokens, (f) Create an onCreate trigger for 'hrd_chat/{docId}' that sends to all tokens except the sender's. Each notification payload should include: notification.title, notification.body, notification.icon (app icon URL), data.click_action (the app URL), data.type (the notification type). Use admin.messaging().sendEachForMulticast() for sending to multiple tokens. Handle expired/invalid tokens by deleting them from hrd_fcm_tokens.
Step 4 - Create functions/.eslintrc.js with standard Firebase Functions eslint config.
Step 5 - Add a firebase.json file at the project root (if not exists) that configures the functions deployment with the functions source directory.
Step 6 - Update .gitignore to include functions/node_modules/ if not already present.
acceptance_criteria: functions/package.json exists with correct dependencies (firebase-admin, firebase-functions)
functions/index.js exports Cloud Functions for hrd_notifikasi, hrd_broadcast, hrd_meeting_invites, hrd_pengumuman, hrd_chat
Each function reads FCM tokens from hrd_fcm_tokens collection
Each function sends push notification with title, body, and click_action
Invalid/expired tokens are cleaned up in hrd_fcm_tokens
verification: Run: node -e "require('./functions/index.js')" from the project root to verify exports
